summary: Code review fixes regression testing - Fixed 2 JavaScript bugs (idx not defined in Home.jsx and StrategyBot.jsx). All 12 requested features tested and working. Backend 100% pass rate (19/19 tests), Frontend all flows working correctly after fixes.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: idx is not defined - map function missing idx parameter
idx is not defined - map function missing idx parameter

critical_code_review_comments: The code refactoring introduced 2 bugs where idx was used in data-testid attributes but not defined in map functions. Both have been fixed.
seed_data_creation: Match reminders created during backend testing are visible in chatroom
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 features tested successfully after fixing 2 JavaScript bugs: 1) Admin login with httpOnly cookie - working, 2) Member login - working, 3) Admin Panel 6 tabs - all render correctly, 4) Round Robin Match Reminder section - visible with date selector and message input, 5) Season Standings - loads with 19+ players, 6) Opponent Scout - form renders with Generate button, 7) Strategy Bot - chat interface with send button, 8) Chatroom - messages load correctly, 9) Home page - stats and features grid, 10) Schedule - calendar and match list, 11) Solo Ladder - player rankings, 12) Education - articles with categories. Backend tests cover auth, season standings, solo ladder, education, chatroom, opponent scout, strategy bot, match reminders, admin panel, schedules, and stats.

1_admin_login.details: Admin login (admin@tennis.com/admin123) working with httpOnly cookie, session persists across navigation

2_member_login.details: Member login (player@tennis.com/player123) working, admin link correctly hidden

3_admin_panel_tabs.details: All 6 tabs render correctly: Matches, Round Robin, Players, Content, Announcements, Settings

4_match_reminder.details: Match Reminder section visible in Round Robin tab with date selector and message input

5_season_standings.details: Season standings page loads at /season-standings showing 19+ players with podium

6_opponent_scout.details: Opponent Scout form renders with all fields (name, playstyle, strengths, weaknesses) and Generate button

7_strategy_bot.details: Strategy Bot chat interface renders with suggested questions and send button (after fix)

8_chatroom.details: Chatroom shows 5 messages including match reminders, input field and send button working

9_home_page.details: Home page loads with stats (19 members, 0 teams, 1 match) and 4 feature cards (after fix)

10_schedule.details: Schedule page loads with calendar date selector and match list

11_solo_ladder.details: Solo Ladder shows player rankings with podium (top 3) and full table

12_education.details: Education page loads with categories (Technique, Strategy, Fitness, Equipment)
